calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-08-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/E. Estacio, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Cindy Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: PEGGY LEE, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Lorenzo Bustillos, ind. & dba R & L Plumbing and also dba Plumberman as follows:
Principal $22,469.00
Attorney's Fees $3,522.00
Costs $333.00 for a total of $26,324.00
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2005 Continued To Mar-18-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
